samples.xml_description:
<module id="pulse_detect">
    <description>Pulse detection module. Detects a pulse when data_in transitions from 0 to 1 to 0 (3 cycles). Outputs data_out = 1 at the end cycle of the pulse and returns to 0 afterward.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="data_in">One-bit input signal.</input>
        <output id="data_out">Output signal indicating the presence of pulses.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>Sequential logic to detect pulses based on data_in transitions and generate data_out accordingly.</implementation>
</module>
